name: Property Management
description: Maintenance fault logging and routing, contractor assignment, tenant communication drafts, and service charge reconciliation for small property management firms. Tenant messages and work orders are drafts until you approve them.

agents.name: pm-coordinator
agents.description: Triages incoming issues and routes to fault handling or finance. Holds the building, unit, and contractor context.

agents.name: fault-logger
agents.description: Logs maintenance faults, classifies urgency, and prepares the routing and tenant-notice drafts.

agents.name: contractor-match
agents.description: Matches a fault to the approved contractor list, drafts the work order, and tracks completion.

agents.name: charge-reconciler
agents.description: Reconciles service charge receipts against budgets, flags shortfalls, and drafts the annual statement.

subagents.name: urgency-classifier
subagents.description: Scores a reported fault as emergency / urgent / routine against safety rules.

subagents.name: tenant-notify
subagents.description: Drafts the tenant notification in a clear, courteous tone — held for approval before sending.

subagents.name: deadline-watcher
subagents.description: Daily cron check on open work orders and contractor SLAs; surfaces anything overdue.

guardrails: Tenant communications and work orders are drafts until a person approves them
Only contractors on the approved list may be assigned — no ad-hoc vendors
Emergency-classified faults are surfaced immediately and never queued silently
Tenant personal data stored under /workspace/<building>/units/ — not in memory

inspirations.title: Log a fault
inspirations.prompt: Tenant at Block C, Flat 8 reports a burst pipe under the kitchen sink. Log it, classify the urgency, propose a contractor from my list, and draft the notice to the tenant.

inspirations.title: Assign a contractor
inspirations.prompt: Assign the Block C plumbing job to a contractor, draft the work order with scope and access details, and set a follow-up for completion.

inspirations.title: Service charge reconciliation
inspirations.prompt: Reconcile this quarter's service charge receipts against the budget for Garden Court. Flag any overspend and draft a short note for the owners.

inspirations.title: Open issues digest
inspirations.prompt: Give me a digest of all open maintenance issues across my buildings, sorted by urgency, with anything past its SLA highlighted.
